transcript: Speaker A: Tell me about yourself. Speaker B: Sir, can I speak in mother tongue? Not comfortable in English. Speaker A: But you studied in English medium, right? Speaker B: Yes. Speaker A: See, you're comfortable in your native language, right? How? Because you have been speaking in this language since you were a kid. That's the reason you're able to speak fluently. If you follow the same for the language English, you can also master it very quickly. See, there is an application called MySivi. It is a very interesting application because they have an AI feature and you also have a co-learners calling. The best feature that I love the most is that you can also talk to other learners in English and you can practice with them in real time and improve your English. And there is no fear of judgment. Speaker B: Is it safe? Speaker A: 40 lakh people are already using this app and this is one of the top-rated English learning apps in India. So you can definitely give it a try. Speaker B: Okay, I will install now and practice daily. Speaker A: Perfect.

summary: An interviewer recommends the MySivi app to a candidate struggling with English. He highlights its AI features, peer practice, and safety. The candidate agrees to download and practice daily.
